translations.definition: num. 第十二的、十二分之一的  n. 第十二日、十二分之一

examples.en: She finished the marathon in twelfth place, just missing the top ten.

translations.zh-TW: 她在馬拉松比賽中以第十二名完賽，差一點就擠進前十。

examples.en: This year marks our twelfth wedding anniversary, so we planned a trip to Kyoto.

translations.zh-TW: 今年是我們結婚十二週年紀念，所以我們計畫了一趟京都之旅。

examples.en: Stay on the highway until the twelfth exit and then turn right.

translations.zh-TW: 沿著高速公路一直開到第十二個出口，然後右轉。

translations.definition: num. 十二的、十二個的  n. 十二、十二個

examples.en: The committee has twelve voting members who collectively approve every new policy.

translations.zh-TW: 委員會有十二位有投票權的成員，共同批准每一項新政策。

examples.en: She bought a dozen eggs because a tray of twelves was on sale at the market.

translations.zh-TW: 她買了一打雞蛋，因為市場上一托盤十二個裝的正好在特價。

examples.en: At exactly twelve o'clock, all the staff gathered in the conference room for the briefing.

translations.zh-TW: 十二點整時，全體員工齊聚會議室聽取簡報。

translations.definition: num. 第二十的、二十分之一的  n. 二十分之一、第二十日

examples.en: He just celebrated his twentieth birthday with friends at a rooftop restaurant downtown.

translations.zh-TW: 他剛和朋友在市中心一間頂樓餐廳慶祝了二十歲生日。

examples.en: The company was founded in the early twentieth century and has grown steadily ever since.

translations.zh-TW: 這家公司創立於二十世紀初，從那時起便穩定成長。

examples.en: Only one twentieth of the applicants were invited to a second interview.

translations.zh-TW: 只有二十分之一的應徵者受邀參加第二階段面試。

translations.definition: num. 二十的、二十個的  n. 二十、二十多歲

examples.en: She budgeted twenty dollars for daily lunches during the business trip.

translations.zh-TW: 她為出差期間每日的午餐編列了二十美元的預算。

examples.en: The temperature dropped into the low twenties overnight, surprising everyone in springtime Taipei.

translations.zh-TW: 氣溫一夜之間降至二十出頭的華氏低溫，讓春天的台北所有人都措手不及。

examples.en: He was in his twenties when he launched his first startup and moved to Singapore for funding.

translations.zh-TW: 他在二十多歲時創立了第一家新創公司，並為了募款搬到了新加坡。

examples.en: The manager has reviewed this contract twice and still has questions about the termination clause.

translations.zh-TW: 經理已經審查過這份合約兩次，對終止條款仍有疑問。

examples.en: Please swipe your access card twice at the gate to enter the secured area.

translations.zh-TW: 請在閘門感應門禁卡兩次，才能進入管制區域。

examples.en: Sales this quarter grew twice as fast as market analysts had predicted.

translations.zh-TW: 本季銷售成長速度是市場分析師預期的兩倍。

translations.definition: n. 雙胞胎中的一個、成對的相似事物  v. 使成對、結為姐妹市  a. 成對的、雙胞胎的

examples.en: They are identical twins who work at the same accounting firm but rarely sit together at meetings.

translations.zh-TW: 他們是同卵雙胞胎，在同一間會計師事務所工作，但在會議上很少坐在一起。

examples.en: The council twinned Bangkok with Vienna to promote cultural exchange between the two capitals.

translations.zh-TW: 市議會將曼谷與維也納結為姐妹市，推動兩個首都之間的文化交流。

examples.en: Twinning two assembly lines boosted the factory's daily output by almost forty percent.

translations.zh-TW: 將兩條組裝線成對運作，讓工廠的日產量提高了近百分之四十。

translations.definition: v. 扭、擰、纏繞、曲解  n. 扭轉、曲折、意想不到的轉折

examples.en: The detective twists the facts in his new book to protect the real identity of the source.

translations.zh-TW: 這位偵探在新書裡曲解事實，以保護線人的真實身分。

examples.en: He twisted the cap off the bottle and poured a glass of sparkling water for each guest.

translations.zh-TW: 他把瓶蓋擰開，為每位客人倒了一杯氣泡水。

examples.en: There is a surprising twist at the end of the contract negotiation that no one on the team predicted.

translations.zh-TW: 合約談判的最後出現了一個出乎意料的轉折，團隊裡沒有人預料到。

translations.definition: a. 扭曲的、彎曲的、扭曲的（心態）、不正常的  v. twist 的過去式與過去分詞

examples.en: A twisted cable under the desk kept tripping the cleaning staff each morning.

translations.zh-TW: 桌下一條扭曲糾結的纜線每天早上都讓清潔人員絆了一下。

examples.en: She is a well-known thriller writer whose characters always have a twisted sense of justice.

translations.zh-TW: 她是知名的驚悚小說作家，筆下角色總有扭曲的道德觀與正義感。

examples.en: The contractor twisted the steel rebar by hand before tying it into the concrete frame.

translations.zh-TW: 承包商手工把鋼筋扭轉一下，再綁進混凝土框架裡。

translations.definition: num. 二、兩個  n. 兩歲、兩點鐘、兩個一組

examples.en: Two apprentices joined the program last month and quickly proved themselves on the production line.

translations.zh-TW: 上個月有兩位學徒加入這項計畫，很快在生產線上證明了自己的實力。

examples.en: When the sun came in twos over the bay, every photographer in the office rushed to the window.

translations.zh-TW: 當海灣上方出現兩個太陽的幻影時，辦公室裡每位攝影師都衝到窗邊。

examples.en: Please bring two forms of identification to your visa appointment at the consulate.

translations.zh-TW: 請攜帶兩種身分證明文件前往領事館辦理簽證面談。

translations.definition: n. 類型、樣式、典型  v. 打字、輸入、測定類型

examples.en: Please specify which type of insurance policy you are applying for on the top line of the form.

translations.zh-TW: 請在表單第一行註明您要申請哪一種保險保單類型。

examples.en: She typed the final report so quickly that no one else in the office noticed her working.

translations.zh-TW: 她打最終報告的速度極快，辦公室裡沒有人察覺她在工作。

examples.en: He has been typing since dawn to meet the deadline for the quarterly briefing deck.

translations.zh-TW: 為了趕上季簡報檔的截稿時間，他從天亮就一直在打字。
